posts.community: Exicom Tele-Services: A Key Player in the Booming EV Sector
posts.text: Can be big oppertunity for tritium x.com RedboxGlobal India (@REDBOXINDIA) on X @REDBOXINDIA DELHI JUST BANNED NEW PETROL AND CNG TWO WHEELERS FROM 2028 AND MADE ELECTRIC CARS UNDER RS 30 LAKH TAX FREE. THE PETROL ERA IN INDIA'S CAPITAL IS OFFICIALLY ENDING.
